title: Pre-Fix Backup
sitemap_generation_rules: src/app/sitemap.ts — static pages + calculators + blogs + variants (filtered by isFormulaVariant) + geo (GSC-approved only) + comparisons + guides + decisions + Phase 32 pages

polluted_urls.fix: Remove from sitemap by removing from variant generator or adding to NOINDEXED_VARIANT_SLUGS

polluted_urls.issue: noindex meta but GSC-exempted in sitemap
polluted_urls.fix: Remove TOOL_GSC_SLUGS exemption — these are noindexed, should not be in sitemap

polluted_urls.issue: noindex meta but GSC-exempted in sitemap

rollback_instructions: git revert <commit_hash> — reverts all Phase 32.4C changes
Or manually: restore TOOL_GSC_SLUGS set to ['afford-100k-40k-6-5pct', 'afford-130k-40k-7pct'] in sitemap.ts
Or manually: restore retirement-1M-30yr variant if page is restored
